name: SrushtiKumar-PathPilot_AgenticAI
description: "PathPilot" is an Agentic AI-powered learning advisor built with IBM Cloud and Granite LLM. It interacts with users to understand their goals, preferences, and skill levels, then generates a dynamic, personalized learning roadmap — ideal for students, professionals, or anyone looking to upskill.
